description: Aura Console Compatibility Patch Database — per-game emulator flags and workarounds

007 Blood Stone.title: 007: Blood Stone
007 Blood Stone.notes: Without the gamma flag the entire scene renders blown-out white. Enable --metal_allow_gamma_unorm16 to restore correct colors.

007: Blood Stone.title: 007: Blood Stone
007: Blood Stone.notes: Without the gamma flag the entire scene renders blown-out white. Enable --metal_allow_gamma_unorm16 to restore correct colors.

xbox360.description: Fix washed-out / blown-out white gamma rendering on Metal backend (macOS). May cause minor color artifacts on some titles.
Vertical sync. Disable for uncapped frame rates.
Unlock DLC / license mask. Set to 1 to enable all purchased content.
Mount the scratch partition. Required by some titles that write temporary data.
Force a specific GPU backend. On macOS 'any' uses Metal. 'vulkan' / 'd3d12' are for Windows builds.
Clear render targets aggressively. Fixes black-box artifacts in some titles.
Fake occlusion query sample count. Set to 1000 to fix games that hang waiting on GPU queries.
Disable CPU clock scaling. Use if a game runs too fast or too slow.
